calendar.matters:
Dpu Scd 218 At 9:00 Am. On June 12, 2003
Off Calendar Jun-17-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This casuse came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S, Ravinantapricha, CSR: Valerie Papale.
Appearances:
Joseph Tursi, Esq. for Plaintiff Flair Diversified Properties, LLC.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendant QT Incorporated dba Quicknet Technologies.
Rent due of $47,500.00
Daily rent damages of $12,333.21
Attorney's fees of $2,280.55
Costs of $316.50
Interest of $1,925.00.
LESS $10,500.00 SECURITY DEPOSIT.
For the total of $56,855.26. This matter is under submission for review of the total amount on the purposed Judgment.
